packages.description: The foundational architecture powering the MiniDevTools ecosystem. Core delivers a unified UI Toolkit master stylesheet, one-click Git release automation, and a custom animated notification engine to keep your entire studio perfectly in sync.

The Data Manager by MiniDevTools acts as the core of any game. 
Offering a modular profiling system to categorise dynamic data sets within miniature profiles with full control over input and output.
A decoupled, event-driven platform manager for achievements and leaderboards.

A premium vault of high-performance shaders and rendering utilities. The Shader Library centralizes your studio's visual materials, providing a sleek gallery interface for rapid iteration, consistent art direction, and stunning graphical fidelity.
A high-performance, node-based UI orchestration framework. Effortlessly manage aspect ratio snapshots, safe zones, and curve-driven transitions with a zero-garbage API.
